libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image, environment variable, or system property appears necessary. For v5.0.0 test code, use Jackson 3 types such as `tools.jackson.databind.JsonNode`; old `com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode` imports are from Jackson 2 and will not compile with the resolved v5 generator dependency.

deterministic_setup.reason: jsonschema-module-swagger-2 is only an extension module and declares jsonschema-generator as provided; tests need SchemaGenerator and its config builder to exercise the module.

The module interprets Swagger Core 2.x @Schema and @ArraySchema annotations, but swagger-annotations is declared as provided by the module; fixture classes need it to compile and cover the annotation mappings.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8739 [Automation] javac compile fails for com.github.victools:jsonschema-module-swagger-2:5.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing 4.38.0 tests use Jackson 2 imports; a version-update fix that only changes dependencies without updating imports will still fail javac.
The Swagger annotation dependency version should stay compatible with the v5.0.0 parent/BOM expectations; 2.2.41 is the version declared by the v5.0.0 parent.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Meaningful tests for jsonschema-module-swagger-2 need the provided main generator and Swagger annotation API on the test compile classpath; v5 also moved schema nodes to Jackson 3 packages.
